summary: The user requested an official statement from Liverpool FC announcing the signing of Jude Bellingham from Borussia Dortmund in summer 2023. The statement was enhanced to include comments from both Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp and Jude Bellingham himself.
facts: Liverpool FC announced the signing of Jude Bellingham from Borussia Dortmund in summer 2023. Jude Bellingham agreed to join Liverpool FC on a long-term contract. Jürgen Klopp commented on Jude Bellingham, stating he is an exciting young player with a big future ahead of him. Jude Bellingham expressed his delight in signing for Liverpool FC, calling it a dream come true.
